article_title: C# 16 的 unsafe 要变成可审查的安全契约
core_theme: C# 正在把 unsafe 从指针语法标记扩展成可传播、可记录、可审查的内存安全契约。
reader_takeaway: 读者能理解新的 C# 内存安全模型如何通过 unsafe block、unsafe 签名、safety 文档和项目级开关，让不安全边界更清楚。
summary_angle: 把旧模型里的隐含约定，整理成一条可追踪的安全链路：标记操作、传播义务、记录契约、守住边界。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 C# 1.0 model 章节，unsafe 主要表示从这里进入 unsafe context，调用方契约不清楚。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧是模糊的旧 unsafe 区域，边界上只有警示线。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 The model in a nutshell，要求 inner unsafe block、传播、/// <safety> 文档和边界 suppression。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间是一条安全链路，四个环节串在一起。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Project-level opt-in，C# 16 safety model 通过新项目级开关启用，AllowUnsafeBlocks 控制是否允许 unsafe 代码。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧是项目开关和编译器检查门。

main_metaphor: 一条从 unsafe 操作到安全调用方的检查链路。
primary_subject: 由 unsafe block、safety 文档和编译器检查门组成的安全链
subject_action: 不安全操作被圈进局部 block，义务沿调用链传播，边界处用文档和 guard 封住。
composition: 等距空间，左到右流程推进
comic_style_reason: 这篇文章讲的是模型变化和调用链传播，适合用日漫式分镜表达流程。
draft_goal: 第一轮验证旧边界到安全契约再到项目开关的流程是否清楚。
revision_targets: 突出 unsafe 义务传播
避免画成真实代码截图
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: C# 16 improving memory safety by turning unsafe into an explicit caller-facing safety contract. The reader should quickly feel that unsafe operations are being moved from implicit convention into visible compiler-enforced boundaries.

Summary angle: turn the article into a readable safety chain: old unsafe boundary, explicit safety contract, project-level compiler gate.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 3 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- contrast: legacy unsafe context has unclear caller obligations, visible label "旧边界"
- mechanism: unsafe block, propagation, and safety documentation form a contract, visible label "安全契约"
- takeaway: project switches enable the new model and compiler gate, visible label "项目开关", numeric fact "C# 16"

Main metaphor: a safety chain connecting an unsafe operation to a safe caller through explicit contracts and guard rails.
Subject: an isometric safety chain made of an unsafe block, a safety document, guard rails, and a compiler gate.
Composition/framing: left-to-right staged progression. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: final style must be japanese-manga, interpreted through isometric conceptual systems scene. Stylized ink lines, restrained speed lines, limited color, polished, clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover.
Color palette: ink black, cool cyan, warm amber, paper white.
Visible text policy: allow only these short Chinese labels or numeric chips: "旧边界", "安全契约", "项目开关", "C# 16", and no more than 4 total text items. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: real IDE screenshots, fake terminal output, English slogans, fake architecture node names, complex charts, neon background.
